mapper.select: select sum(OUT_SUCCESS_NUM) as outSuccessSum, sum(OUT_ERROR_NUM) as outErrorSum, DATA_TYPE as dataType, to_char(CREATE_TIME,'yyyyMMdd') as createTime from SHPTSTATISTICS.SJGC_DATA_SUMMARY where CREATE_TIME >= trunc(sysdate -7) and PUSH_HOUR < #{nowHour, jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by DATA_TYPE, to_char(CREATE_TIME,'yyyyMMdd')

select sum(OUT_SUCCESS_NUM) as outSuccessSum, sum(OUT_ERROR_NUM) as outErrorSum, case when DATA_TYPE = '1' then '接入' when DATA_TYPE = '2' then '处理' when DATA_TYPE = '3' then '入库' when DATA_TYPE = '4' then '集成' else DATA_TYPE end as dataType, to_char(CREATE_TIME,'yyyyMMdd') as createTime, PUSH_HOUR as pushHour from SHPTSTATISTICS.SJGC_DATA_SUMMARY where CREATE_TIME >= trunc(sysdate -7) and (DATA_TYPE = '1' or DATA_TYPE = '2')
and upper(out_protocol) = upper(#{tableId})
group by DATA_TYPE, to_char(CREATE_TIME,'yyyyMMdd'), PUSH_HOUR

select sum(OUT_SUCCESS_NUM) as outSuccessSum, sum(OUT_ERROR_NUM) as outErrorSum, STORE_TYPE || '>' || PROJECT_NAME as storageLocation, to_char(CREATE_TIME, 'yyyyMMdd') as createTime, PUSH_HOUR as pushHour from SHPTSTATISTICS.SJGC_DATA_SUMMARY where CREATE_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - 7) and DATA_TYPE = '3' and PROJECT_NAME is not null
and upper(out_protocol) = upper(#{tableId})
group by to_char(CREATE_TIME, 'yyyyMMdd'), PUSH_HOUR, STORE_TYPE || '>' || PROJECT_NAME

select out_en_name as outTableNameEn, out_cn_name as outTableNameCh, out_protocol as outProtocol, sum(OUT_SUCCESS_NUM) as outSuccessSum, sum(OUT_ERROR_NUM) as outErrorSum, DATA_TYPE as dataType, to_char(CREATE_TIME, 'yyyyMMdd') as createTime from SHPTSTATISTICS.SJGC_DATA_SUMMARY where CREATE_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - 7) and PUSH_HOUR < #{nowHour, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and out_en_name is not null group by out_en_name, out_cn_name, out_protocol, DATA_TYPE, to_char(CREATE_TIME, 'yyyyMMdd')
